name: OpenIntuneBaseline
description: A community-driven security baseline framework for Microsoft Intune. Provides pre-configured security policies for Windows, Windows 365, and macOS aligned with NCSC, CIS Benchmarks, ACSC Essential Eight, and Microsoft best practices. Importable via IntuneManagement tool or native Intune import.
keywords: how to harden windows with intune
how to deploy ncsc baseline intune
author: James Robinson

securityCheck.aiSummary: No security issues detected in the provided code snippets. The OpenIntuneBaseline scripts implement manifest management and standard Intune/Windows management tasks without obfuscated payloads, remote code execution, credential harvesting, data exfiltration, malicious patterns, or hardcoded secrets. Recommendations: ensure script signing and access controls on policy manifests, maintain proper logging and monitor changes to PolicyManifest.json, and review location-related settings for privacy impact within organizational policy.
